products.name: Ninja Crispi Pro 6-in-1 Glass Air Fryer
products.description: Cook, reheat, bake and dehydrate with this 6-in-1 glass air fryer. Nontoxic glass containers are microwave, freezer and dishwasher safe for effortless prep and cleanup.

products.name: 8 Blade All-in-1 Vegetable Chopper
products.description: Chop, slice and dice vegetables in seconds with 8 interchangeable stainless steel blades. Includes a catch container for mess-free prep — perfect for salads, soups and meal prep.

products.name: Kitchen Mama Auto Electric Can Opener
products.description: Open cans hands-free with a simple button press. Smooth edge design and automatic operation make it ideal for anyone wanting effortless, safe kitchen prep every day.

products.name: Silonn Nugget Ice Maker Countertop
products.description: Makes 33lbs of chewable pellet ice per day right on your countertop. Self-cleaning function and compact design make it perfect for home kitchens and small offices.

products.name: Cosori TurboBlaze 9-in-1 Air Fryer 6Qt
products.description: 9 cooking modes in one appliance — air fry, roast, bake, broil, dehydrate and more. Premium ceramic coating means healthier cooking and incredibly easy cleanup every time.

products.name: Zulay Rechargeable Milk Frother Handheld
products.description: Rechargeable handheld frother with 4 whisks and a powerful 2-speed motor. Makes perfect lattes, cappuccinos, matcha and protein shakes in seconds — no plug needed.

products.name: TempPro TP19H Digital Meat Thermometer
products.description: Instant-read thermometer with motion-sensing backlit display. Waterproof design makes it perfect for BBQ, grilling, candy making and everyday cooking with precise results.

products.name: Ninja Professional Blender 1000W 72oz
products.description: 1000W total crushing technology blends smoothies, crushes ice and handles frozen fruit effortlessly. The large 72oz pitcher handles family-sized batches with ease.

products.name: Potane Precision Vacuum Sealer Machine
products.description: 8 smart presets for dry, moist, soft and delicate foods. Keeps food fresh up to 5x longer — ideal for bulk buying, meal prep and reducing food waste at home.

products.name: Aunmaon Touchless Automatic Soap Dispenser
products.description: Hands-free soap dispensing with adjustable volume control and long battery life. Works with thick or thin soap — great for kitchens, bathrooms and easy for young children.

products.name: Borlebbi Electric Meat Slicer 200W
products.description: Two removable stainless steel blades with adjustable thickness settings. Slice meat, cheese and bread to your preferred thickness — built-in child lock for added safety.

products.name: Noalto Reusable K Cups 2-Pack
products.description: Universal stainless steel pods compatible with Keurig 1.0 and 2.0 machines. Use your own ground coffee and save money on every single brew — eco-friendly and easy to clean.

products.name: 2 Slice Easy Touch Screen Toaster
products.description: Stainless steel toaster with wide slots, even toasting for bagels & bread, reheat & defrost, removable crumb tray.
